rulesets.name: FZ-1: Transform Tests
rulesets.note: Badge-driven. Click each badge — a toast appears immediately. All five should show [PASS]. No AI message needed.

rules.name: T1: exact match
rules.note: {{fuzzy:80:Tavern,Castle,Forest:Tavern}} — exact match always scores 1.0, well above threshold.

rules.name: T3: article variant
rules.note: {{fuzzy:75:Tavern,...:The Tavern}} — threshold lowered to 75; 'The Tavern' vs 'Tavern' scores above 0.75.

rules.name: T4: below threshold (should return empty)
rules.note: {{fuzzy:99:Tavern,...:Tarvern}} — threshold 99 rejects even close matches. Expect empty string.

rules.name: T5: multi-word candidate
rules.note: {{fuzzy:80:Dark Forest,...:Drak Forest}} — tests that multi-word candidates score correctly as a unit.

actions.template: {{fuzzy:80:Dark Forest, Light Cave, Bright Meadow:Drak Forest}}

rulesets.name: FZ-2: Trigger Tests
rulesets.note: Step 1: Click 'Set chatvar' — writes chatvar::TRG_fuzz_loc = Tarvern (persists until changed). Step 2: Send any message to the AI — T6 and T8 should toast green [PASS]; T7 and T9 should stay silent (red toast = failure). Step 3: Ask the AI to include the word 'Tarvern' in its reply — T10 should fire and show the matched text. T6/T7 fire on every AI message (turn var reset each turn). T8/T9 use the chatvar from step 1 and keep firing on every subsequent message.

rules.name: Setup: write chatvar for T8/T9
rules.note: Click once before sending any message. Writes chatvar::TRG_fuzz_loc = Tarvern for the condition tests.

rules.name: T6-write: set $fzt = Tarvern
rules.note: Fires on every MESSAGE_RECEIVED. Sets the global turn var used by T6 and T7. Listed before T6/T7 so the stability loop sees it first.

rules.name: T6: var-match fuzzy SHOULD fire
rules.note: var-match fuzzy 'Tavern' 80 on $fzt='Tarvern'. Jaro-Winkler ~0.94 >= 0.80. {{keyword}} = the variable's actual value.

rules.name: T7: var-match fuzzy should NOT fire
rules.note: var-match fuzzy 'Castle' 90 on $fzt='Tarvern'. Tarvern vs Castle scores very low — should not reach 90. If this toast appears, something is wrong.

actions.title: T7: UNEXPECTED FIRE
actions.message: "{{keyword}}" matched "Castle" at 90 — this should not have happened

rules.name: T8: condition fuzzy SHOULD fire
rules.note: Fires when chatvar::TRG_fuzz_loc fuzzy 'Tavern' 80. Click 'Set chatvar' first, then send any message.

rules.name: T9: condition fuzzy should NOT fire
rules.note: Fires if chatvar::TRG_fuzz_loc fuzzy 'Castle' 90 — Tarvern vs Castle at 90 should not fire. If this appears, something is wrong.

actions.title: T9: UNEXPECTED FIRE
actions.message: chatvar::TRG_fuzz_loc matched "Castle" at 90 — this should not have happened

rules.name: T10: keyword fuzzy match
rules.note: Fires when the AI's response contains text that fuzzy-matches 'Tavern' at threshold 80. Ask the AI to use 'Tarvern' in its reply. {{keyword}} = the actual text that matched.
